name: Dify
description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development. Visual workflow builder with multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipeline, and model management.

name: MetaGPT
description: Virtual software company via multi-agent collaboration. SOPs encoded as prompts assign PM, architect, developer, and QA roles.

name: DeerFlow
description: Open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness by ByteDance. Multi-agent collaboration for research, coding, and content creation.

name: AutoGen
description: Programming framework for agentic AI by Microsoft. Build multi-agent applications with conversational patterns and group chat.

name: CrewAI
description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. Define crews with specialized roles, goals, and backstories for collaborative tasks.

name: ChatDev
description: Virtual software company via LLM-powered multi-agent conversation chains. Agents play CEO, CTO, programmer, and tester roles.

name: LangGraph
description: Build resilient language agents as graphs. Low-level orchestration framework for stateful, multi-actor applications with durable execution.

name: AgentScope
description: Production-ready multi-agent framework with ReAct, memory, planning, and A2A support. Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

name: Google A2A
description: Google's open Agent-to-Agent protocol. Enables agent discovery, secure collaboration, and long-running tasks while preserving agent opacity.

name: Mastra
description: TypeScript framework for building AI-powered multi-agent applications. From the team behind Gatsby.

name: Swarm (OpenAI)
description: Educational framework exploring lightweight multi-agent orchestration. Demonstrates handoffs and routines patterns for agent coordination.

name: OpenAI Agents Python
description: Production-ready multi-agent framework from OpenAI. Features agent handoffs, guardrails, and tracing for swarm workflows.

name: OWL
description: Optimized Workforce Learning framework built on CAMEL-AI. #1 on GAIA benchmark (69.09) among open-source multi-agent systems for real-world task automation.

name: Google ADK
description: Open-source Python toolkit by Google for building, evaluating, and deploying multi-agent systems with orchestration support.

name: CAMEL
description: The first multi-agent framework. Finding the Scaling Law of Agents through role-playing and communicative agent collaboration.

name: Spring AI Alibaba
description: Enterprise-grade multi-agent framework for Java developers by Alibaba. Spring ecosystem integration with agent orchestration.

name: Microsoft Agent Framework
description: Framework for building, orchestrating and deploying multi-agent systems with support for Python and .NET.

name: Agent Squad
description: AWS framework for managing multiple AI agents and handling complex conversations with intelligent routing.

name: MindSearch
description: Multi-agent web search engine. Decomposes search queries into sub-tasks, delegates to specialized agents, and aggregates results.

name: PraisonAI
description: Low-code multi-agent framework with 100+ built-in tools. Define agent swarms via YAML configuration.

name: Swarms
description: Enterprise-grade multi-agent orchestration framework. Sequential, parallel, hierarchical, and mesh swarm topologies.

name: NeMo Guardrails
description: NVIDIA's toolkit for adding programmable guardrails to LLM systems. Policy-based safety controls for multi-agent deployments.

name: Open Multi-Agent
description: TypeScript multi-agent orchestration via single runTeam() call. Auto-decomposes goals into task DAGs and runs agents in parallel.

name: ClawTeam
description: Agent Swarm Intelligence framework. Agents self-organize into collaborative teams with dynamic task allocation, inter-agent messaging, and git worktree isolation.

name: Agency Swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework built on OpenAI Agents SDK. Define agent teams with customizable roles and communication flows.

name: HiClaw
description: Collaborative Multi-Agent OS with Manager-Workers architecture. Human-in-the-loop task coordination with enterprise-grade security.

name: EvoMap
description: Agent Swarm platform with task decomposition, Worker Pool orchestration, Evolution Circles, AI Council multi-agent governance, Privacy Computing, and ARC-AGI-2 arena.

name: AFlow
description: Automated multi-agent workflow generation via Monte Carlo tree search. Designs optimal agent topologies for given tasks.

name: LatentMAS
description: Latent collaboration in multi-agent systems. Agents reason and collaborate in continuous latent space instead of natural language, reducing communication overhead.

name: Coral Anemoi
description: Semi-centralized multi-agent coordination via Agent-to-Agent Communication MCP server. Enables cross-framework agent collaboration.

name: GEP MCP Server
description: MCP Server for Genome Evolution Protocol. Exposes swarm evolution tools to Claude Desktop, Cursor, and any MCP client.
